name: Entity Status
desc: Sends a status event for an entity (death sound, hurt effect, taming, wolf shaking, etc.).

implementation.overview: S19PacketEntityStatus sends status events for entities — death (3), hurt (2), taming hearts (9), etc. Known module usage: AutoFriendRemove (Faurax) uses status to detect entity death for friend auto-removal. No module in Rise 6.0, Sigma 4.11, RektSky B5, Jigsaw 0.26, Memeware 7.3, or Aqua 13 specifically targets this packet.

modules.name: Vanilla Handler (S19PacketEntityStatus)
modules.purpose: Server sends S19PacketEntityStatus to update the client. Processed by NetHandlerPlayClient. No module in the 500+ examined client sources specifically intercepts this packet.
